questions.question: What country's defense sector offers tourists rides on obsolete T-84 tanks?
What gonzo writer opined: 'I hate to advocate drugs, alcohol, violence, or insanity to anyone, but they've always worked for me'?
What British leader was said to light a cigar upon awakening each morning at 7:15?
Where did NASA scientists find rocks they nicknamed 'Yogi' and 'Scooby-Doo'?
What Yankee hurler threw the 15th perfect game in major league history, in 1998?
What shrink declined Samuel Goldwyn's 1925 invite to come to Hollywood to write a 'really great' love story?
